The Ideal Cannabis wall
Photography © Spencer Gray · classifications simulated for layout · tap a card to swap its photo
Templates below use GMO and its assigned image.

What this is

A populated demo: eight Ideal Cannabis strains, each with a real photo from your shoot, dropped into the gallery wall and all six social templates. Every card carries the two devices that make the system recognizable — the proportional Flower Spectrum strip and the ten-sector fingerprint ID.

Photos sit in framed panels and all type lives on the dark canvas, so the layout reads cleanly whether a shot is on white, black, or a colored sweep. Each social template exports a crisp 2× PNG.

About the fingerprints

Classifications are simulated — believable, engine-consistent shapes for layout demonstration, flagged “SIM” wherever they appear. They are not lab results. Run each strain’s COA through the Chemovar Classifier to publish real ones. Kush Mints is the exception — it uses its real validated panel and is marked “REAL.”

Compliance

Aroma classification — not effects or medical claims. Aroma leads; THC is factual data. Keep effect language off anything public.

Swapping photos

Drop a different web-final onto the loader to replace the matching strain, or tap any wall card to pick a new shot for it. Reset to originals restores the loaded set. Nothing uploads — files are read locally in your browser.
